title: Pathian Cu Thangthat Si Ko Seh
composer: F. J. Crosby / W. H. Doane

metadata.title: Pathian Cu Thangthat Si Ko Seh
metadata.composer: F. J. Crosby / W. H. Doane
metadata.subtitle: To God be the Glory

parts.name: Soprano
lyricText:
Zei-zong ser-tu Pa-thian, thang-ṭhat si ko seh,
Vaw-lei a dawt ca'h a Fa-pa a kan pek;
Sual ngaih-thiam-nak ca a nun-nak kha a sian,
Mi kip ca-ah nun-nak kut-ka a hun cang.

Maw Khamh-nak tling thi-sen in a kan tlanh-nak,
A zum-mi kip sin i Pa-thian bia-kam-nak;
Lung-tak in a zum-mi mi-sual bik hmanh nih,
Je-suh sin-in sual ngaih-thiam-nak a hmuh colh.

A ser-mi thil vial-te kong a kan cawn piak,
Fa-pa Je-suh thawng-in lawmh-nak a sang chim;
Si-hmanh-seh Je-suh kan hmuh te tik-ah cun,
Khua-ruah-har in lawmh-nak a sang chin-chin lai.

sections.label: Refrain
sections.lyricText:
Bawi-pa cu, thang-ṭhat u,
Khua za-kip cul dih seh,
Bawi-pa cu, thang-ṭhat u,
Mi kip i lawm hna seh,
Fa-pa Je-suh thawng-in Pa-thian cu panh u.
Zei-zong vial-te ser-tu Pa-thian thang-ṭhat u.
